mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, real_name, gender, phone, email, member_type, status, create_time FROM member ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, username, password, real_name, gender, phone, email, member_type, status, create_time FROM member ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT id, username, password, real_name, gender, phone, email, member_type, status, create_time FROM member
AND real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member
AND real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
SELECT id, username, password, real_name, gender, phone, email, member_type, status, create_time FROM member WHERE username = #{username} AND password = #{password} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (username, password, real_name, gender, phone, email, member_type, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{memberType}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE status = #{status}
